creator: piotr_sawicki@yahoo.com
text:
hi . looks like after installing new xorg-serwer package the xfce wm just hangs completely moment after starting . No mouse response , keyboard is also no working . 
But the system is alive you can log via ssh, check top process ,  logs etc even start x11vnc server and is ok 

Hardware amd64 amd cpu , radeon firepro 4800 graphics 
all the new updated packages from repository 
recompiled from ports drm-fbsd12.0-kmod mesa-dri mesa-libs
System updated from source and buildworld mergemaster
Swapped graphics card to another physical one  radeon w5100 
nothing of these help

uname -a
